name: open-graph-v1-sample-a-1200x630
prompt: Create a premium open graph image for Surnex. Use the attached anchor image only as a style anchor. Social-preview-first composition, dark modular product cluster, strong central silhouette, simpler and bolder than a homepage hero, controlled lime signal accents, elegant, minimal, readable at small preview size, premium B2B SaaS look. Compose for approximately 1200x630 wide crop. No readable text. No fake UI labels. No logo. No wordmark. No clutter. Output image only.
